{{Quote|A Wookiee rocket launcher. This thing is twice my size! Best be careful where I point it.|RC-1138|<ref name="SWRC">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
The '''Wookiee Guided Rocket Launcher''' was a gigantic homing rocket launcher, created by the Master [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Crafters from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

It was effective against [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]], [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 Homing Spider droids]] and other large enemies. The rocket launcher used guided warhead-tipped rockets and could hold five rockets at a time. They were fired from the shoulder and could either be "dumb"-fired or locked onto a target.

[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] from [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] used this launcher to destroy the bridge on [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]] village to protect it. [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] also wielded a Wookiee rocket launcher.
